rabbit-stew-argiro.name: Rabbit Stew

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 flush white wine (or half white and red)
2 ripe tomatoes (or 1 can of 400 gr whole peeled tomatoes)
11⁄2 flush white wine (or half white and red)
2 ripe tomatoes (or 1 can of 400 gr whole peeled tomatoes)

instructions: Cut the rabbit first in 5-6 portions.
Wash well, pour some vinegar and dry it with absorbent paper.
Clean and cut the onions into thick slices.
Each onion is 6 or 8 depending on its size.
Preheat the oven to 220 degrees C in resistance, we will bake on the bottom grill.
We'll use a medium hull with a heavy lid for perfect result.
Add a layer of half cut into thick slices of onions.
Place the portions of the rabbit on a layer above.
Cover the rabbit with the remaining onions in a layer.
Above we make a layer of the tomatos or if they are fresh tomatoes cut them into thick slices and cover the rabbit stew.
They enter the garlic cloves whole and the laurels here and there in the materials.
Add the spices, the carnations and the thyme.
Pour with the wine, vinegar and olive oil.
Add salt and pepper.
Cover the hull with the lid.
Bake for 1 hour.
Then lower oven to 170 degrees C and continue baking for an extra hour.
In the end, the sauce will be dense and reduced because onions turn into thick sauce.
Enjoy it with French fries or rice.

radicchio-and-arugula-salad-with-dates-h.name: Radicchio And Arugula Salad With Dates, Hazelnuts, And Feta
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Place hazelnuts on baking sheet; toast until fragrant and skins begin to crack, 10 to 12 minutes. Let cool briefly. Wrap hazelnuts in kitchen towel; rub briskly to remove as much skin as possible. Chop hazelnuts coarsely; set aside. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Store in airtight container at room temperature.

Combine vinegars in small bowl. Whisk in olive oil; season with salt and pepper. Combine radicchio, arugula, dates, and hazelnuts in serving bowl. Toss with enough dressing to coat. Sprinkle feta over salad.

radicchio-with-hot-honey-vinaigrette-and.name: Radicchio With Hot Honey Vinaigrette And Cotija

ingredients.item: . mild red pepper flakes (such as aleppo-style or gochugaru) or 1 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes
. crushed chipotle chile flakes or crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast hazelnuts in a single layer on a small rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown and fragrant, 7–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.

Meanwhile, place quinoa in a large saucepan and pour in water to cover by at least 4"; season generously with salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to maintain an active simmer, and cook until quinoa is just tender, 12–15 minutes. Drain and return to pot. Cover and let sit 10 minutes.

Bring honey, mild red pepper flakes, chile flakes, and 1 Tbsp. water  to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir, then let cool 5 minutes. Whisk oil and vinegar into honey mixture; season dressing with salt.

Combine radicchio and quinoa in a large bowl. Drizzle half of dressing over and toss to coat. Taste and season with more salt if needed (don’t forget the Cotija will add some salt too). Drizzle with more dressing and top with hazelnuts, Cotija, and some cilantro.

raisin-bread-very-rich-and-sweet-comeder.name: Raisin Bread, Very Rich And Sweet
raisin-bread-very-rich-and-sweet-comeder.original_name: Pan de pasas, muy rico y dulce

ingredients.item: 10 ml de brandy u otro licor dulce

instructions: Take the water and dissolve the yeast, save it, we'll use it later.

In a bowl, you'll put the flour, sugar, salt and cinnamon. You're gonna scramble till you get all the dry ingredients. Later, you will make a space in the middle of the mixture (volcano type), to add melted butter and brandy. Also add water with dissolved yeast.

With the help of your hands, start the amast to integrate everything and get a consistent mass, amasa till it has a manageable texture. Do one of your dough a ball, put it in a bowl, cover it with a little cloth and leave to stand for 30 minutes.
Corta las pasas a la mitad.

Once you have been put up, you will put your cover and put your dough. That's how you'll be chewing up for about five minutes and then stretching the dough very well. He adds raisins and intersects them with wrapped movements until they are scattered throughout the mass.
We're going with the form of bread. To this guy I'd rather do it in a mold and cut it into slices and be easy to eat. But you can also make them round and small.
Fold up your bread mold, spread your dough, turn it around with a rolling and then put it into the mold. You'll let them stand for another 30 minutes to double their volume.
Without 5 minutes, preheat your oven at 180 degrees Celsius.
You will put your bread in the oven for 30 minutes and cook perfectly. He's gonna have his back up and his face's so sweet inside.
Take him out of the oven, let him cool into a grid so you can cut him into pieces.
We're done!

raisin-pie-i.name: Raisin Pie I
instructions: Combine 3/4 cup white sugar, cornstarch, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves in a saucepan. Stir in sour cream and lemon juice. Add the raisins. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. Cook and stir until thick. Remove from heat.

Stir a small amount of the hot mixture into the egg yolks, and then return this to the hot mixture. Cook and stir for one minute. Cool filling to lukewarm, and then add the nuts. Pour into the cooled pie shell.
Beat egg whites with cream of tartar to soft peaks. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar; beat until stiff peaks form, and all the sugar is dissolved. Spread meringue on pie, carefully sealing to the edges.
Bake at 177°C (175 degrees C) for 12 to 15 minutes.

raspberry-chocolate-cake-lezzet.name: Raspberry Chocolate Cake
instructions: 1. Leave the butter for cake and wait.
2. Take the egg yolks and powder sugar into the mixing container and cook well.
3. Add and mix the azar azar by blending flour and cocoa.
4. Add butter.
5. Cook eggs in dry and clean bowl with mixer.
6. Add 1 cup of sugar and continue to cook until it is joined.
7. Add to other mixture with the help of Spatula and mix without whipping.
8. Spray the dough into the oily paper-series oven tray and cook it in the oven set to 180 degrees.
9. Leave to cool.
10. Prepare the cream according to the tariff on the bag.
11. 11. Cut 8 pieces with lush cake 8 cm cake circle.
12. Place a piece of cake on the bottom of the circle.
12. August A amount of creamy and frambuases index.
14 July Turn off the cream again and close a piece from the cake.
15. Prepare others in this way and wait for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
16. Remove the cakes from the circle and plaster the edges with the cream.
17. September Paste chocolate pieces on cocoa sprinkler and edges.
18. Decorate with Frambuaz and chopped peanut and leave it in the refrigerator until the service is made.

raspberry-vatrushka-buns.name: Raspberry Vatrushka Buns
instructions: Sprinkle yeast over 1/4 cup of warm milk in a small bowl. Stir in 1 teaspoon flour and 1 1/2 teaspoon caster sugar; stir to dissolve. Let stand until the yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes.

Combine 1 cup sifted flour and 1/4 cup warm milk in a large bowl. Pour in the yeast mixture and mix well to form a sticky dough. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap, and cover the plastic-wrapped bowl with a clean kitchen towel. Let the dough rise in a warm place for until doubled, 2 hours or more.
Beat butter, egg yolk, and 2 tablespoons caster sugar with an electric mixer until creamy, about 3 minutes. Add the butter mixture to the dough; pour in 1 cup flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt.

Transfer the dough to a floured surface and knead until the dough is no longer sticky and feels smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Place the dough into a lightly greased bowl, cover the bowl with plastic wrap, and top it with the towel. Let the dough rise again for 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Return the dough to a floured work surface. Press down lightly with your hands to deflate it, and use a knife to cut the dough into 8 pieces.

Shape each piece into a ball and arrange them on the prepared baking sheet. Place two glasses on the baking sheet to hold up the towel, and arrange the towel over the rolls to prevent them from drying out. Let rise for 30 minutes.

Remove the towel and glasses. Dip the bottom of a 2-inch glass or jar in flour and press down in the center of each bun to form a hollow. Fill the buns with the raspberries. Brush the beaten egg white on the edges of the buns and sprinkle each bun with about 1 1/2 teaspoon sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until the buns are golden brown, about 25 minutes.

raspberry-infused-vodka.name: Raspberry-infused Vodka
instructions: Combine vodka, raspberries, sugar, and water in a large, non-metallic container; press and muddle raspberries until incorporated into mixture. Set mixture aside at room temperature for 5 to 6 days, stirring for 10 to 15 minutes each day.
Strain mixture multiple times through a fine-mesh strainer or cheesecloth until berries and seeds are removed and liquid is lighter in color.

11. 11. 11. 11. We are boiling water and then bake the dough into the interior and cook for 3-4 minutes.
12. After adding cream to a pan and heated, we prepare the preparation into salt, pepper, butter, addruff and so on.

14 July We set ravioli on the veuuml; after heating the tomato sauce in a pan.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-jalapeno-.name: Recipes For Chicken Thighs with Jalapeno Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-jalapeno-.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo con salsa de jalapeño

ingredients.item: 1 taza de agua o caldo de pollo

instructions: Retira la piel de los muslos y hazle algunos cortes. Sazona con sal y pimienta. Reserva.
Pela la cebolla y corta a la mitad, haz lo propio con los tomates. Pela los dientes de ajo.
In a pot, place onion, jalapeno, garlic teeth and tomato. Fold a cup of water or chicken stock with a pint of salt. Take the fire for about 10 minutes or till the vegetables are soft.
Meanwhile, melt the butter into a frying pan and dore the chicken thighs for about 10 minutes from each side. Withdraw and reserve.
When the vegetables are soft, get a blender with the water that's left and drink till a salsa forms.
Swallow the salsa into the frying pan where the thighs have been golden and rectify the salt. Add pepper and oregano to taste. Mix and cook for about 3 minutes.
Incorporates his thighs into his salsa and ends up cooking for about 10 minutes or until they are soft and impregnated with his jalapeno sauce.
When they're ready, turn them off and let them rest. Serve and accompany with your favorite garrison.

recipe-for-eggplant-bites-with-pesto-sau.name: Recipe For Eggplant Bites With Pesto Sauce
recipe-for-eggplant-bites-with-pesto-sau.original_name: Receta de bocaditos de Berenjena con salsa pesto
instructions: Corta las berenjenas en ruedas y ponlas en un recipiente con agua y abundante sal durante 20 minutos.
Bate un huevo en un plato hondo y esparce el pan rallado en un plato llano.
Take the eggplants out of the water and cover them up a little.
Pasa las berenjenas primero por el huevo batido y luego por el pan rallado, que queden bien cubiertas por todos lados.

It heats a frying pan with medium heat with enough vegetable oil to submerge eggplants and fry them till they are golden on both sides. as they get ready put them on absorbent paper to remove their excess fat.
Put them on a baking plate and add them up to 1 tablespoon of pesto sauce and a slice of goat cheese to each.
Reput them into the oven previously pre-heated at 180 ° C until they are slightly gratified.
Retira y sirve.

recipe-for-eggplants-stuffed-with-turkey.name: Recipe For Eggplants Stuffed With Turkey
recipe-for-eggplants-stuffed-with-turkey.original_name: Receta de berenjenas rellenas de pavo
instructions: Cut the eggplants in half. Then remove the pulp from the vegetable with a tablespoon and spread the seawater to clear the bitter fluid.
Cut his pulp into small pieces and put up with salt water.
Cut the onion into small pieces. Take the garlic and his hair and stick his teeth with his garlic.
Warm up an olive oil casserole and fry the garlic by the onion for two minutes. It later incorporates the ground turkey, blend and cook for 4 more minutes.
Now, add tomato sauce, paptika and salt and pepper to suit suit. Mix and cook for 3 minutes with medium heat.
Posteriormente, vierte la taza de vino blanco y la pulpa de la berenjena escurrida, mezcla y termina de cocinar por 7 minutos hasta que el pavo quede jugoso y cocido.
Apaga y reserva.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Toma las bases de las berenjenas y rellena con el pavo. Luego, ralla el queso mozzarella y esparce.
Coloca las berenjenas en una bandeja y hornea por 15 minutos hasta que se cocine el vegetal y gratinen.
Retira del horno, deja reposar un rato y disfruta.

recipe-for-golden-tuna-tacos-comedera.name: Recipe For Golden Tuna Tacos
recipe-for-golden-tuna-tacos-comedera.original_name: Receta de tacos dorados de atún

ingredients.item: 400 g of high-quality tanned fresh or canned tuna
1  chile serrano finamente picado ((opcional para darle un toque picante))
Sal y pimienta  negra al gusto

instructions: If you use fresh tuna, cook it slightly into a frying pan with an oil chorrit, only till it changes color. Let cool down. If you wear canned tuna, be sure to scold them perfectly to prevent tortillas from breaking.

In a big bowl, mix the tuna, the purple onion, garlic, the broken carrot, the serrano chili, the cilantro, the mayonnaise, the Dijon mustard and the lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper to taste. We have to have a creamy but firm mix.
It slightly warmes tortillas into a paddle or frying pan so that they are more flexible and do not break after bending them.
It puts about two tablespoons of the tuna mixture at the centre of each omelette. Fold them with care as half a moon and secure them with a wooden stick if necessary.
Warm up enough oil in a deep frying pan with medium-high heat. The oil's got to be hot and hot but doesn't smell.
Fry the tacos by tands, turning them so that they will be dyed evenly from both sides. That takes about 2 to 3 minutes to the end.
Remove tacos and place them onto absorbing paper to remove excess fat.
Be with your favorite sauce at once.

recipe-for-potato-pancake-with-egg-and-g.name: Recipe For Potato Pancake With Egg And Garlic
recipe-for-potato-pancake-with-egg-and-g.original_name: Receta de tortita de patatas con huevo y ajo
instructions: We scrape 1 potato with oregano and salt.
In a frying pan we put up the potato and we golden on both sides, as we put a hole and put an egg. We'll put them in an oven till I get them.
In a frying pan we have 3 teeth with laminated garlic with abundant sunflower oil.
Una vez cuajado el huevo emplatamos colocando la picada de ajo y decoramos con hojas de albahaca.

recipe-for-stewed-tuna-with-vegetables-c.name: Recipe For Stewed Tuna With Vegetables
recipe-for-stewed-tuna-with-vegetables-c.original_name: Receta fácil de atún guisado con verduras

ingredients.item: 2  papas medianas (peladas y cortadas en cubos)
1 taza de caldo de pescado o agua

instructions: First, in a deep frying pan or a pot, heat up the two tablespoons of olive oil at medium heat. We want the oil to be hot but not so bad as to get smoke out.

Add minced onion and cook till clear and delicious smell about 5 minutes. Then, add the chopped garlic and continue to cook for another minute, only long enough for the garlic to free its magic but without burning.

Now will be the time to add the pates cut into cubes (and pitted, remember) and the red pepper into strips. Mix everything well and let them cook together about 10 minutes. The potatoes should start to get some light and the pepper to get soft.

Add the minced tomatoes and the sweet peppermint teaspoon. Mix well so that everything will be combined. Let the tomatoes cook up till they get rid and form some kind of sauce, about 5- 7 minutes. Don't worry if it looks a little dry, that's normal.

Swallow the mug of fish or water into the frying pan. Let everything simmer till the potatoes are tender, which should take about 15 minutes. Test the potatoes with a fork and they have to be soft but not broken.

When potatoes are ready, add fresh tuna cut into cubes to frying pan. Mix well so that the fish will be cooked uniformly with the other ingredients. That will only take about 5- 7 minutes, as fresh tuna will cook quickly and we want it to be juicy.
Finally, try stew and tighten salt and pepper if necessary. Serve hot and decorate with some fresh parsley if you want to give it a nice touch of color.

recipe-for-traditional-pot-beans-comeder.name: Recipe For Traditional Pot Beans
recipe-for-traditional-pot-beans-comeder.original_name: Receta de frijoles de la olla tradicionales
instructions: With the beans already clear, soaked for a night and drained, we will start the recipe. We'll put them in a pot big enough. That means that the beans should have less than 1 / 3 of the pot, so that they can be covered with 2 / 3 of water and that we still have space.
Then we'll prepare some vegetables to give our beans a taste. At first we'll peel the half onion and we'll peel the garlic as well.

In the case of an ebazote, we need them to be clear and clear. I prefer to disinfect the herbs I use in kitchen, submerging them with water mixed with a vinegar jet and leave them there for 5 minutes.
Cuando tengamos el epazote limpio, lo pondremos en la olla con el trozo de cebolla y los dientes de ajo.
Entonces calentaremos la olla con los frijoles a fuego alto, y esperaremos que rompa a hervor.

At this point, we'll put the fire down and let the beans cook for about 2 and a half hours, 3 hours. The goal is to get them soft. It's important, however, to monitor the cooking of beans so that the water level's always slightly above the level of grains. If necessary, you can add some more water.
The beans have to be removed with some frequency during cooking time.

Once the cooking time has been completed, when the beans are soft, it will be time to add salt to its taste. I recommend to add a few tablespoons, stir up the beans very well, try and then, correct the date if necessary. If more salt had to be added, it was best to do so from little to little, to avoid the risk of passing.

Then the pits will be ready to serve. As they are added to each plate with a tablespoon, we have to pay attention to the emergence of some ingredients used: an onion piece, garlic teeth and an apezote branch. They can withdraw from production or simply leave them in the pot and care that they do not end up at some of the plates.

red-curry-shrimp.name: Red Curry Shrimp
instructions: Stir red curry paste in large skillet over medium-high heat until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add coconut milk and clam juice and bring to boil, whisking until paste dissolves. Boil until sauce is thick enough to coat spoon, stirring occasionally, about 7 minutes. Add shrimp to sauce. Cook until shrimp turn pink and are just opaque in center, turning occasionally, about 4 minutes. Stir in cilantro. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Divide shrimp and sauce among 4 shallow bowls. Garnish with lime wedges and serve.

red-fruit-salad-argiro.name: Red Fruit Salad
instructions: For the red fruit salad, wash first and dry the vegetables very well.
Cut them into thick pieces with your hands.
Mix them in a salad pot.
Add the fruits, add the grilled cheese.
Beat all the dressing materials and pour the salad last minute.
Mix and serve immediately.

red-pesto-pasta.name: Red Pesto Pasta
instructions: Cook anchovies, garlic, oil, and walnuts in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring often, until walnuts are deeply golden and garlic is just beginning to turn golden, 4–5 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring often, until it turns a shade darker, about 2 minutes. Remove pan from heat and let cool 5 minutes.
Transfer walnut mixture (including the oil) to a food processor. Add chiles, lemon juice, 3 oz. Parmesan, and ½ tsp. salt. Pulse until a thick paste forms.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain pasta, reserving 1½ cups pasta cooking liquid.

Scrape pesto into a large bowl and add butter, then pasta and ½ cup pasta cooking liquid. Using tongs, toss pasta vigorously, adding more pasta cooking liquid if needed (you may not need all of it), until glossy and well coated with sauce.
Divide pasta among bowls. Season with more salt and top with Parmesan.
Do Ahead: Pesto can be made 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.

red-rice-salad-with-pecans-fennel-and-he.name: Red Rice Salad With Pecans, Fennel, And Herbs

ingredients.item: Cilantro leaves and finely chopped tender stems
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Toasted pistachio oil or almond oil

instructions: Cook rice according to package directions. Spread out on a rimmed baking sheet; let cool.
Meanwhile, toss fennel and onion with 2 Tbsp. lime juice in a large bowl and let sit, tossing occasionally, until lime juice is almost entirely absorbed, 10–15 minutes.
Coarsely chop ⅓ cup pecans; finely chop remaining nuts. Cook in olive oil in a small saucepan over medium-low until golden brown, 5–10 minutes. Let cool.
Add rice and pecans to fennel mixture along with remaining 1 Tbsp. lime juice and toss to combine. Gently fold in cilantro; season with salt and pepper. Serve drizzled with pistachio oil, if desired.
__DO AHEAD:__Rice salad (without cilantro) can be chilled up to 1 day. Bring to room temperature before serving.

red-velvet-teleculinaria.name: Red Velvet

ingredients.item: 1 spoon (soup) well filled with baking powder

instructions: Bind a shape (about 20 cm in diameter) with butter and reserve. In a bowl, mix the milk with vinegar and book for 20 minutes. Then add the yeast and flour, previously sifted, and involve.

In another bowl aside, beat the butter softened with sugar until you get a whitish cream. Add the eggs one by one, always beating very well. Then gradually add the mixture of flour and milk, and continue to beat.

Finally, add the dye, always beating until it turns quite red. Lay the dough in shape and put it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 35 to 40 minutes. Remove from the oven, deform and let it cool. Then cut into 3 slices of the same size, reserving the kernel of the cake that is falling loose.

Prepare o recheio: bata as natas em chantili bem firme. Junte o queijo e bata mais um pouco. Acrescente o leite condensado e envolva. Num prato de servir, disponha camadas alternadas de bolo e creme, terminando com o creme. Decore o topo com o miolo de bolo que reservou e sirva.

red-wine-sangria.name: Red Wine Sangria
instructions:
Combine 2 bottles chilled dry red wine, 1 cup brandy or cognac, ½ cup Cointreau, and ⅓ cup superfine sugar in a punch bowl or large pitcher. Stir until sugar is dissolved. Add 1 orange, sliced thin and 1 lemon, sliced thin and chill for 1 hour. Add seltzer and stir gently, then top with a block of ice or ice cubes.


Editor’s note: This cocktail recipe was first printed in the August 1983 issue of ‘Gourmet.’ Head this way for more of our favorite summer drinks →

refreshing-mango-lassi.name: Refreshing Mango Lassi
instructions: Remove the cardamom seeds from the pods and crush into a powder with a mortar and pestle.
In a blender, combine the ice, chopped mangoes or mango pulp, yogurt, milk, and ground cardamom. Blend until smooth. Adjust the sweetness and thickness according to your preference.
Pour the lassi into glasses and garnish with whipped cream and pistachios.
Enjoy!

rhubarb-coffee-cake-with-buttermilk.name: Rhubarb Coffee Cake With Buttermilk
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Cream brown sugar, 1/2 cup white sugar, and shortening together in a mixing bowl. Beat in egg. Add flour, buttermilk, baking soda, vanilla extract, and salt. Fold in rhubarb. Pour batter into the prepared baking dish.
Combine remaining 1/2 cup white sugar, pecans, and cinnamon in a bowl. Sprinkle on top of batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 50 minutes.

rib-eye-roast.name: Rib Eye Roast

ingredients.item: Sea salt and cracked black pepper to taste

instructions: Beat butter and garlic together in a small bowl until combined.
Poke several holes in rib eye with a sharp knife. Rub butter mixture all over meat and season generously with salt and pepper. Place rib eye fat-side up in a roasting pan.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes to develop a crust.

Reduce heat to 163°C (165 degrees C) and continue cooking until rib eye is reddish-pink and juicy in the center, 1 ½ to 2 hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center will read 63°C (63 degrees C) for medium. Let rest before slicing.
Serve and enjoy!

rib-roast-done-like-a-steak.name: Rib Roast Done Like A Steak

ingredients.item: Rendered fat from meat being cooked (optional
Finely grated garlic or garlic mashed to a paste
Coarse sea salt or kosher salt

ingredients.prep: sage, and thyme), tied together with kitchen twine, then tied to the end of a wooden spoon (for herb brush)

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: finely chopped fresh chiles, finely chopped scallions (optional)

instructions: Combine first 11 ingredients in a 2-qt. saucepan. Bring just to a simmer; remove from heat. For the best flavor, refrigerate in a tightly sealed container for 1–2 days. Reheat over low heat to melt butter before using.
Whisk in lemon juice and vinegar just before using.

Set up grill with an elevated grate and preheat grill to high. (You can buy a grill with a hand-cranked wheel that allows you to raise and lower the cooking surface. Or you can save yourself a lot of money and buy an extra grate for your grill, using bricks to elevate it above the main grill grate.)
Season the beef all over with Four Seasons Blend and pepper, then lightly moisten your hands with water and work seasonings into the meat. Let stand for 10 minutes to develop a 'meat paste' coating.

Put beef on the clean (unoiled) grill grate and cook, without moving it, for 1 minute. Turn, making sure to grab 'eye' portion of each steak with your tongs, and cook for 1 minute. The meat may stick and tear a bit, but this is okay, even desirable—the sticking and tearing is what I call 'meat scruffing.' (For newer grills, where less sticking and tearing occurs, or for increased surface area, score meat with a knife.) Turn the meat and cook for 3 minutes, then flip and cook for 3 minutes longer.

Put the foil-wrapped brick on the grill grate to be used to steady the meat. Lean roasts, cut side down, up against brick and cook for 4 minutes. Turn roasts and repeat until all 4 sides have cooked for 4 minutes each.

Move brick to one side and continue cooking roasts, turning every 3–4 minutes and basting with the herb brush and the basic baste each time roasts are moved, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 105°, 25–30 minutes.
Transfer roasts to a platter, brush lightly with the basic baste, and let rest for at least 5 minutes and up to 30 minutes.
Remove brick from grate and carefully remove elevated grill grate.

Put roasts on hot grill and cook, turning every 3–4 minutes and basting lightly each time roasts are moved, until instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 120°. Transfer roasts to cutting board and let rest for 5–10 minutes.
Combine oil and parsley in a small bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Add garlic or shallot, chiles, and scallions, if desired. Set aside.

Finely chop herbs at the end of herb brush. Mix herbs into dressing. Cut meat from bones, then cut bones into individual ribs. Cut meat into 1/4-inch slices. Turn each slice in dressing to coat; place on a platter. Pour juices from cutting board over meat. Serve with bones alongside.

rice-and-mushroom-pastry-lezzet.name: Rice And Mushroom Pastry
instructions: 1. Take the flour and salt dough kneading container.
2. Azar azar adds warm water and knead until it is a soft consistency dough.
3. Take the dough 6 cloths and the i&ccedil of a container.
4. Ü add olive oil to the car and close to the movie.
5. Wait for 1 g&uuml in refrigerator.
6. Onion of the coast for the internal harper.
7. Take the olive oil into the pan and heat it.
8. Add chopped onion and roast for 2-3 minutes.
9. Add sliced Mushroom and tiny cut red peppers.
10.  Kavurmaya devam edin.
11. 11. Add and mix spices, dill, salt and rice.
12. Take the pan from the stove and tribute.
12. August Open in fineness that will not break the dough with oxlava; the inner shareholder and wrap push in roll form.
14 July Roll dough threeto fold and index the greased tray.

rice-noodles-with-shrimp-and-coconut-lim.name: Rice Noodles With Shrimp And Coconut-lime Dressing

ingredients.prep: serrano, or Thai chile, very thinly sliced

instructions: Whisk coconut milk, lime juice, fish sauce, shallot, and brown sugar in a small bowl until smooth. Gradually add oil, whisking constantly until emulsified; set aside.

Cook noodles in a large saucepan of boiling salted water according to package instructions until tender (you want them to be a little more cooked than al dente since they are served cold). Drain; rinse under cold water, then drain again.

Toss noodles, shrimp, cucumber, watercress, and cilantro in a large bowl with three-quarters of reserved dressing to combine and evenly coat; season with salt. Top with chiles and peanuts and drizzle remaining dressing over.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

rice-with-coca-cola-and-raisins-to-accom.name: Rice With Coca-cola And Raisins To Accompany Your Meals
rice-with-coca-cola-and-raisins-to-accom.original_name: Arroz con Coca-Cola y pasas para acompañar tus comidas

ingredients.item: 1 taza de coca-cola regular (no light ni zero, ya que no caramelizan igual)
1/3 taza de pasas rubias o negras
1 cda de almendras fileteadas o nueces picadas (opcional para textura)

instructions: Lava el arroz hasta que el agua salga casi transparente para evitar que quede demasiado pegajoso.
In a small pot, heat up oil and butter. Add minced onion and spray until clear.
Incorporate the rice and have it slightly for 2 minutes without letting it burn.
Add raisins, an orange frying, a pinch of cinnamon and an english sauce. Fold well.
Vierte la Coca-Cola y el agua. Revuelve solo una vez.
Agrega la pizca de sal y la hoja de laurel.
Cooking at medium heat till the liquid starts bubbling.
It reduces fire to a minimum, cover and lets cook for 15 minutes without unawaking.
Retira del fuego y deja reposar 5 minutos antes de abrir la olla.
Sponge the rice with a fork and, if you wish, add steamed almonds to bring texture.

roast-chicken-with-harissa-and-schmaltz.name: Roast Chicken With Harissa And Schmaltz
instructions: Bring garlic, sugar, coriander seeds, 1 cup kosher salt, and 8 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar and salt. Transfer to a large bowl and add 1 cup ice. Let cool. (You can also refrigerate or freeze brine if you want to speed things up.)

While brine is cooling, bone chicken breasts, leaving leg and thigh quarters intact. Start by cutting off wing tips; discard. Place chicken, skin side down, on a cutting board. Working with 1 chicken half at a time, angle the blade of a thin, sharp knife flush against breast bone and cut along bone to separate the rib cage from flesh. The only bones remaining should be in the wing, thigh, and drumstick. Repeat on the other side (save bones for making your next pot of stock).
Place chicken halves in cooled brine. Cover tightly and chill 12 hours.
Transfer chicken to a rimmed baking sheet or baking pan and pick off coriander seeds. Spread harissa all over chicken. Cover tightly and chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

Preheat oven to 400° (if you have a convection oven, turn the convection fan on). Heat schmaltz in a large cast-iron pan over medium. Carefully place chicken halves, skin sides down, in pan, making sure all the skin is in the fat. Cook until skin darkens and starts to crisp, about 5 minutes. Transfer skillet to oven and roast chicken until skin is very dark and meat is more than halfway cooked through, 20–25 minutes.
Remove skillet from oven and carefully turn chicken. Return to oven and roast, skin side up, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thigh registers 165°, 8–12 minutes.
Transfer chicken to a large platter, placing skin side up. Drizzle some of the schmaltz over chicken and serve remaining schmaltz alongside.

roast-chicken-with-pickles-teleculinaria.name: Roast Chicken With Pickles
instructions: Get the chicken, put it in a bowl and season with lemon juice and salt. Let it marinate for 20 minutes.

Then remove it from the marinade and bring grilling on both sides. Peel and pinch the garlic teeth, put them in a pot, add the olive oil, the chopped parsley, paprika, the laurel leaf, salt and pyriíri and bring to the heat.
When the chicken is roasted, remove it from the grill, cut it into pieces and water it with the sauce, wrap well and serve decorated with pickles or to taste.

roast-lobster-with-pink-butter-sauce-lan.name: Roast Lobster With Pink Butter Sauce (langouste Rôtie Au Beurre Rose Hostelleries Saint-roch)
instructions: Into a large kettle of boiling salted water plunge the lobster and boil it, covered, for 2 minutes. Transfer the lobster with tongs to a buttered baking dish and with kitchen shears cut down the back of the shell without piercing the flesh.
Sprinkle the lobster with salt and pepper, brush it with the butter, and sprinkle it with the herbes à tortue.
Roast the lobster in a preheated moderately hot oven (375° F), basting it frequently with the pan juices, for 12 to 15 minutes, or until the flesh is firm.
Halve the lobster lengthwise, arrange it on a heated plate, and serve it with the butter sauce.
In a stainless steel or enameled saucepan combine the wine, the shallot, the thyme, the bay leaf, and salt and pepper to taste and reduce the wine over moderately high heat to about 2 tablespoons.

Add the cream and reduce the liquid by half. Whisk in the butter, 1 piece at a time, over low heat, adding each new piece before the previous one has melted completely. (The butter must not get hot enough to liquefy. The sauce should be the consistency of a light hollandaise.) Add the lemon juice and salt and pepper to taste and strain the sauce through a fine sieve into a heated serving bowl.

roast-oysters.name: Roast Oysters
instructions: Preheat oven to 500°. Top oysters with a thin slice of Hot Sauce Brown Butter (about ⅛" thick).
Spread a layer of rock or pickling salt on a rimmed baking sheet and nestle oysters in salt.
Roast until butter is bubbling and edges of oysters are just beginning to curl, about 5 minutes.
Serve topped with bacon and parsley.

roasted-carrots-and-potatoes.name: Roasted Carrots And Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Toss potatoes and carrots in a large bowl with olive oil. Add honey, lemon zest, oregano, salt, and pepper; toss to coat. Spread onto a large rimmed baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 45 minutes.

roasted-chicken-with-chorizo-and-sweet-p.name: Roasted Chicken With Chorizo And Sweet Potatoes

ingredients.item: Sweet potatoes cut into long wedges about  0.5” thick

ingredients.prep: cut in half and then cut each half into quarters

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Season chicken with vinegar, salt and pepper; set aside. Heat 1 Tbsp. olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Add chorizo and cook, stirring occasionally until starting to brown about 2 minutes. Add chicken, skin side down and cook, until golden brown, 5-8 minutes

Toss sweet potatoes, garlic, onion, rosemary, white wine and remaining Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet. Place chicken and chorizo on top of vegetables and roast until chicken is cooked through and potatoes are tender, 20-25 minutes.
Divide chicken and potatoes among plates and garnish with additional rosemary.

roasted-sweet-potatoes.name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes
instructions:
Preheat oven to 450°. Toss potatoes, oil, salt, and pepper on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast, tossing occasionally, until tender and browned, 35–45 minutes.


Editor’s note: This recipe was originally published as part of our ultimate guide to roasting veggies in November 2015. For more, check out our perfect roasted brussels sprouts, crisp-tender roasted broccoli, or head over to this collection of our best roasted vegetable recipes.

roasted-vegetable-flautas-recipe-comeder.name: Roasted Vegetable Flautas Recipe
roasted-vegetable-flautas-recipe-comeder.original_name: Receta de flautas de verduras asadas
instructions: Pela la cebolla y corta en julianas. Haz lo mismo con el pimiento.
Stretch his garlic teeth. Peel carrot and cut into julians as well as pumpkin.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and pamper your garlic and onion for a few minutes.
Incorpora la zanahoria, mezcla y saltea. Cocina por 4 minutos.
Add pumpkins and Saxony with salt and pepper. Mix up till you have the baked and roasted vegetables.
Warm up your omelets to get them soft. Fill them and wrap them up.
Warm another frying pan with abundant oil to fry.
Fry the flutes till they are well doradite.
Once ready, put them on an absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Serve them with fresh cheese and enjoy them.

rooster-of-wine-argiro.name: Rooster Of Wine
instructions: Heat the olive oil and butter and, over medium to high heat, add a few pieces of roost.
We put them on a platter.
In the same oil, lowering the heat, sauté the onion and garlic for 3 minutes.
Put the cock back on and sprinkle with the spices.
Let's let 1 minute-2's take off their perfume.
Add the paste and sugar and put the wine out, adding a little bit.
Rub the pot with a spoon.
Add the tomatoes and little water, barely half-covering the cock.
Cover the pot and simmer the rooster until it softens well, about 1 hour and 45 minutes to 2 hours, and tie the sauce (if you use chicken farm it wants less boiling).
In between salt and pepper.
Meanwhile, boil the pasta in a lot of salted water.
Drain and pour with some raw olive oil.
Put the pasta on a deep platter and add the pieces of the cock.
Pour with the tied sauce.
Sprinkle with plenty of grated cheese.

rosa-mae.name: Rosa Mae

ingredients.item: Orange pekoe or black tea bag

instructions: Combine gin and tea bag in a 2-cup measuring cup. Let steep for 5 minutes. Discard tea bag. Stir honey and 1 1/2 teaspoons. water in a small bowl and add to tea-infused gin. Mix in lime juice and Licor 43.

Fill 2 Collins glasses with ice cubes. Pour half of mixture into a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Shake vigorously 20 times; strain into prepared glasses, dividing equally. Top each with a splash of soda water. Discard ice in shaker and repeat to make 2 more cocktails. Garnish each drink with a lime wedge and add a dash of bitters.

rosemary-mezcal-fizz.name: Rosemary Mezcal Fizz

ingredients.prep: briefly singed over flame of a gas burner if desired

instructions: Chill 2 Collins glasses. Combine rosemary leaves and salt in a cocktail shaker and gently press out oils with a muddler, about 45 seconds. Add egg white, lemon zest, mezcal, lemon juice, and agave nectar. Cover cocktail shaker; shake vigorously (without ice) until egg white is emulsified, about 20 seconds. Carefully uncover (shaker will be quite full) and add ice just to fill. Cover and shake until egg white is very frothy and cocktail is cold, about 30 seconds.
Set chilled glasses next to each other and double-strain cocktail into glasses, dividing evenly. Top off each drink with 3 oz. club soda and garnish with a rosemary sprig.

rye-flour-bagel-recipe-lezzet.name: Rye Flour Bagel Recipe

ingredients.item: Half water cup grape breaks (diluated with 1/4 water glass)
u inner usedum breaksses instead of honey, maplescence or palm breaksses; color and light sweet aroma is preserved.
You can get a different flavor by adding apple juice instead of water.
Instead of olive oil, you can use lube oil, corn oil or butter (relied); the texture of the dough changes to light-and-ccedil; but the flavor is maintained.
